text:
Please go to close without leaving you unattended forever.
By the way, it is www/asterisk12, but should update it because there is a
problem of security.

[CVE-2008-2119]
- Asterisk Project Security Advisory - AST-2008-008
<http://downloads.digium.com/pub/security/AST-2008-008.html>

Is there a plan of correspondence?

tks lots.
// f.kimura
